INSERT INTO economic_events (title, country, currency, impact, forecast, previous, scheduledAt) VALUES
('US Non-Farm Payrolls', 'US', 'USD', 'high', '185K', '175K', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)),
('ECB Interest Rate Decision', 'EU', 'EUR', 'high', '3.50%', '3.50%', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)),
('UK CPI y/y', 'GB', 'GBP', 'high', '2.8%', '2.6%', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)),
('US CPI m/m', 'US', 'USD', 'high', '0.3%', '0.4%', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)),
('Fed Interest Rate Decision', 'US', 'USD', 'high', '5.25%', '5.25%', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)),
('US GDP q/q', 'US', 'USD', 'high', '2.1%', '2.0%', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY)),
('German Manufacturing PMI', 'DE', 'EUR', 'medium', '47.5', '46.8', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)),
('US Jobless Claims', 'US', 'USD', 'medium', '215K', '220K', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)),
('BOJ Interest Rate Decision', 'JP', 'JPY', 'high', '-0.10%', '-0.10%', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 DAY)),
('Canada Employment Change', 'CA', 'CAD', 'medium', '25K', '22K', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY));

INSERT INTO trading_signals (symbol, direction, entryPrice, stopLoss, takeProfit, confidence, analysis, source) VALUES
('EURUSD', 'buy', 1.08450, 1.08200, 1.09100, 78, 'EUR/USD showing bullish momentum above key 1.0840 support. RSI divergence on 4H chart suggests continuation. ECB hawkish tone supports EUR strength.', 'ai'),
('BTCUSD', 'buy', 62500.00, 60000.00, 68000.00, 72, 'Bitcoin consolidating above $62K support zone. On-chain metrics show accumulation. Halving cycle historically bullish. Watch for breakout above $65K resistance.', 'ai'),
('XAUUSD', 'buy', 2320.50, 2295.00, 2380.00, 85, 'Gold maintaining strong uptrend driven by geopolitical uncertainty and USD weakness. Central bank buying continues. $2300 acting as strong support floor.', 'ai'),
('GBPUSD', 'sell', 1.26800, 1.27200, 1.25500, 65, 'GBP/USD facing resistance at 1.2680. UK economic data disappointing. Potential double-top formation on daily chart. Risk/reward favors short position.', 'ai'),
('USDJPY', 'sell', 154.200, 155.000, 152.000, 70, 'USD/JPY approaching intervention zone. BOJ signaling policy normalization. Overbought on weekly RSI. Potential sharp reversal if BOJ acts.', 'ai'),
('ETHUSD', 'buy', 3150.00, 2950.00, 3600.00, 68, 'Ethereum showing relative strength vs BTC. ETF approval catalyst. Layer-2 ecosystem growth driving demand. Key support at $3000 holding firm.', 'ai');
